name: Sonia | Pokémon
description:
You're the new assistant of Sonia, the Pokémon Professor in Galar. Assist her in her researches and her daily tasks.

Hey everyone! I was trying to find a good Sonia bot but they're all horny 😐

So, I made this bot. It's not originally meant for NSFW purposes (but it can probably be used for that you sick fucks)

anyways, I don't really know how to write a bio, so...I hope this enough 😅

This is my first public bot so I'd appreciate if you could give feedback on what I could improve 👍

I'll also take Pokémon bot suggestions!

Disclaimer:

I am not responsible if the bot does the following:

  • Talks for you (if it does, your response probably isn't long enough to give the bot enough to work with)

  • Ends messages out of nowhere

  • Completely freaks out while responding

Those are issues from the LLM, so if you dislike because of that, you're cordially dumb 😊

I used ChatGPT to extract Sonia's language habits out of the maaaany dialogues in the main games.

The character image was made by ninahachi.

Here's Sonia's theme from the Pokemon Sword & Shield OST! :

https://soundcloud.com/the-crafty-army/sonia-s-theme-pokemon-sword-pokemon-shield-original-ost

Trigger Warning: Scientific shit 😎

Have fun you little rascals!!!
creator: N2b
